attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
STGO.BK_SERIAL_NUM,
STGO.PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
STGO.CREATE_DTM,
STGO.DV_CREATE_DT,
STGO.SK_SERIAL_ID_INT,
STGO.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,
STGO.SK_MESSAGE_ID,
STGO.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY,
STGO.ACTION_CODE,
 CASE WHEN NRPBS.BK_SERIAL_NUM  IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT 
NRPBD.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY,
SERIAL_NO AS BK_SERIAL_NUM, 
  MESSAGE_ID  AS SK_MESSAGE_ID,  
  SERIAL_ID AS SK_SERIAL_ID_INT,      
  PID_LINE_ID       AS SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN  PROCESS_STATUS  = 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS = 'E' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS  = 'N' THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS PROCESS_STATUS_CD,  
COALESCE(STG.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    AS CREATE_DTM,
CAST(STG.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_CREATE_DT,
STG.ACTION_CODE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ASRN_IFACE STG
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL NRPBD
ON STG.MESSAGE_ID=NRPBD.SK_MESSAGE_ID
AND STG.PID_LINE_ID=NRPBD.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
UNION ALL
SELECT 
NRPBD.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY,
SERIAL_NO AS BK_SERIAL_NUM, 
  MESSAGE_ID  AS SK_MESSAGE_ID,        
  PID_LINE_ID       AS SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,
    SERIAL_ID AS SK_SERIAL_ID_INT,      
CASE WHEN  PROCESS_STATUS  = 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS = 'E' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS  = 'N' THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(EX.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    AS CREATE_DTM,
CAST(EX.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_CREATE_DT,  
EX.ACTION_CODE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ASRN_IFACE EX
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL NRPBD
ON EX.MESSAGE_ID=NRPBD.SK_MESSAGE_ID
AND EX.PID_LINE_ID=NRPBD.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT

)STGO

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_SRL NRPBS
 ON STGO.BK_SERIAL_NUM=NRPBS.BK_SERIAL_NUM

SELECT 
SERIAL_ID,
REQUEST_ID,
CREATION_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
MESSAGE_ID,
PID_LINE_ID,
SERIAL_NO,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
ITEM_INTEGER,
ITEM_REVISION,
QUANTITY,
SERIAL_STATUS,
B2B_MFG_STATUS,
RETRY_COUNT,
PROCESS_STATUS,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2,
ATTRIBUTE3,
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE6,
ATTRIBUTE7,
ATTRIBUTE8,
ATTRIBUTE9,
ATTRIBUTE10,
ATTRIBUTE11,
ATTRIBUTE12,
ATTRIBUTE13,
ATTRIBUTE14,
ATTRIBUTE15,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
BATCH_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT 

SERIAL_ID,
REQUEST_ID,
CREATION_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
MESSAGE_ID,
PID_LINE_ID,
SERIAL_NO,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
ITEM_INTEGER,
ITEM_REVISION,
QUANTITY,
SERIAL_STATUS,
B2B_MFG_STATUS,
RETRY_COUNT,
PROCESS_STATUS,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2,
ATTRIBUTE3,
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE6,
ATTRIBUTE7,
ATTRIBUTE8,
ATTRIBUTE9,
ATTRIBUTE10,
ATTRIBUTE11,
ATTRIBUTE12,
ATTRIBUTE13,
ATTRIBUTE14,
ATTRIBUTE15,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
BATCH_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ASRN_IFACE STG
)STGO
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  SK_MESSAGE_ID,SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL )SP
WHERE STGO.MESSAGE_ID=SP.SK_MESSAGE_ID
AND STGO.PID_LINE_ID=SP.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
)
